description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Kansas City, Missouri, founded around 1912 by Sicilian mafiosi Joseph and Peter DiGiovanni. It expanded through bootlegging during Prohibition and later engaged in racketeering, gambling, loansharking, and drug trafficking. The family was led for decades by Nicholas Civella, who forged alliances with other families and used Teamsters to fund Las Vegas casinos. As of 2015, it had an estimated 12 made members and remains active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Primarily the Kansas City metropolitan area, with additional territory throughout Missouri and in Omaha and Tulsa, as well as Las Vegas
country_links.context: The family has territory in multiple U.S. cities including Omaha, Tulsa, and Las Vegas.
